name: PrettyFly Communications Triage
description: Reads connected mailboxes and calendars, ranks what matters, and creates proposed actions for human approval. V1 never applies mailbox/calendar mutations.

capabilities.name: Triage communications
capabilities.description: Read connected mail and calendars; return digest buckets and proposed actions.

capabilities.name: Approve proposed action
capabilities.description: Approve one stored proposal for a later provider-specific apply worker.
